MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-18-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendants To Disqualify Plaintiffs Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stephanie Foster, esq. (415-956-6588x23) of Steven Adair MacDonald for Plaintiff/opposing party Minghao Chen, et al.
Terry Amastassiou, esq. and Nathaniel Dunn, esq. (415-417-5113) of Ropers Majeski for Defendants/Moving party MIN MAC and CHOK MAC.
Court reporter: Raquel G. Sharp CSR #10319 (925-384-0003; raquelgiana33@gmail.com).

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Mr. Amastassiou stated there was no notice of prior representation with same landlord. Ms. Foster stated they did not address issue regarding conflict of interest until after parties agreed to mediation scheduled for November. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs MIN MAC and CHOK MAC's Motion By Defendants To Disqualify Plaintiffs Counsel is Taken Under Submission. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Raquel G. Sharp CSR #10319 (925-384-0003; raquelgiana33@gmail.com). (D501)
